items.title: How AI is reshaping the future of the AEC industry
items.summary: AI is poised to rewire the architecture, engineering, and construction sector. Firms that move quickly to reimagine workflows, improve data use, and automate work sites will thrive.

items.title: How can the public sector meet the AI moment?

items.title: The future of delivering software as a medical device
items.summary: Software is reshaping how medtech organizations create value. A new approach to quality assurance during software-as-a-medical-device development, supported by agentic AI, can help them realize it.

items.title: Is commercial aerospace ready for a demand reckoning?
items.summary: A new survey reveals a widening gap between airline sentiment and the rest of the value chain.

items.title: The ‘bridge builder’ COO: Delivering results by engaging stakeholders
items.summary: Today’s COOs work with an increasingly broad set of stakeholders. Success means understanding the “why” that drives each one.

items.title: Patrick Finn on how tension can lead to healthcare’s reinvention
items.summary: McKinsey Senior Partner Patrick Finn examines the current unique moment in healthcare and why AI could help reshape who leads healthcare’s next era.

items.title: Gigafactory delivery on time: Solving the SOP delay challenge
items.summary: Battery plants are essential for the energy transition. Most miss their ramp-up deadlines, however. Here’s how to fix the delivery model.

items.title: How consumers are reshaping the future of mobility
items.summary: Our recent survey reveals shifting consumer priorities, with rising expectations for affordability, sustainability, and technology and greater openness to new brands and transportation modes.

items.title: How physician CEOs hone the double-edged sword of clinical training
items.summary: The journey from physician to CEO has no prescribed path, but those who’ve reached the top reveal how they evolved the strengths and instincts forged in clinical training for enterprise leadership.
